message:
feat(tui): Major TUI expansion with detail pane and inline search

Comprehensive overhaul of the terminal UI with new navigation modes,
detail viewing, and inline search capabilities:

Detail Pane Features:
- Full conversation viewer with message-by-message navigation
- Syntax highlighting for code blocks in messages
- Inline find (Ctrl+F//) for searching within displayed content
- Jump-to-match navigation with n/N keybindings
- Scroll position memory when switching between conversations

Input Modes (data.rs):
- Query: Main search input
- Agent: Filter by specific agent
- Workspace: Filter by workspace path
- CreatedFrom/CreatedTo: Date range filtering
- PaneFilter: Quick filter within result list
- DetailFind: Inline search within detail pane (NEW)

Navigation Enhancements:
- Vim-style hjkl navigation throughout
- Tab/Shift-Tab for pane focus cycling
- Enter to expand, Escape to collapse
- Page Up/Down and Home/End support
- Mouse scroll support in all panes

Visual Improvements:
- Role-based message styling (user/agent/tool/system)
- Query history with debouncing fix (sux.2)
- Status bar with current filter summary
- Responsive layout adapting to terminal size

The role_style function maps MessageRole variants to themed
colors for consistent visual distinction across all themes.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,6 +10,9 @@ pub enum InputMode {
     Workspace,
     CreatedFrom,
     CreatedTo,
+    PaneFilter,
+    /// Inline find within the detail pane (local, non-indexed)
+    DetailFind,
 }
 
 #[derive(Clone, Debug)]
